title: 11 Top-Rated Herbal Remedies for Eye Swelling Relief
description: Arnica montana cream is a natural remedy that can help reduce eye swelling. The cream contains compounds that help reduce inflammation and ease pain. When applied to the affected area, these compounds can help decrease blood flow to the area, which in turn can reduce swelling. Arnica montana cream also has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm the skin around the eyes.
